company.name: Unknown Studio
company.tagline: Small Team. Scalable Solutions. Powered by AI.
company.methodology: AI-driven specs, rapid prototyping (functional prototypes in days), iterative refinement. Uses HoangSa internally for spec-driven, bounded-context development across all products.

products.name: InstaNote
products.description: Mobile app using speech recognition AI to turn voice notes into organized text
products.technical_context: AI voice-to-text, auto-categorization, smart tagging, cross-platform cloud sync. Supports Vietnamese and English. Key technical angles: speech recognition accuracy, on-device vs cloud processing, multilingual challenges, sync architecture.

products.name: Cuối Tuần Đi Đâu
products.description: Travel/family app for discovering 1,000+ family-friendly spots in Vietnam with AI-driven recommendations
products.technical_context: AI recommendation engine matched to family needs. Reviews from real parents. Free forever, community-built. 1,000+ locations nationwide. Key technical angles: AI recommendations, community-driven data quality, location data challenges in Vietnam.

products.name: HoangSa
products.description: Open-source context engineering system for Claude Code that eliminates AI context loss
products.technical_context: Spec-driven development (DESIGN-SPEC + TEST-SPEC). DAG-based execution (parallel waves, sequential dependencies). Context engineering via bounded contexts with context_pointers. Slash command pipeline: /hoangsa:menu → /hoangsa:prepare → /hoangsa:cook → /hoangsa:taste → /hoangsa:plate → /hoangsa:ship. 3-tier verification (static analysis, behavioral tests x3, semantic review). GitNexus code intelligence (call graphs, impact analysis). Task manager sync (ClickUp, Asana). 15 framework addons. Rust CLI + Node.js installer. Install via npx hoangsa-cc. What makes it different: treats large projects as orchestration problems with structural contracts, bounded task dispatch, DAG scheduling, and integrated dev workflows. This is the backbone of how Unknown Studio builds its own products.
